title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a dual-brain AI architecture for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoid robots for home, security, and industrial applications. NVIDIA released Isaac GR00T, a six-foot robot platform with Jetson Thor and Unitree H2 components delivering two thousand teraflops of onboard compute.
